---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

-   TUSAŞ, Candidate Engineer (ERP), 2025 – Ongoing

<!-- -->

-   Goaltech, R&D and Business Development Intern, 2025

## Internships

-   Turkcell, Supply Chain Procurement Intern, 2025

<!-- -->

-   Staj-Up, Intern, 2023

# Projects

-   TUBITAK High School Research Projects – “Lattice Point Count of Triangles and Parallelograms”, Regional Competition 2nd Place (2020)

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, SQL, Power BI, Excel

# Hobbies

Reading, AI/ML projects, Data visualization,

# CV

You can download my cv.

[Download My CV](nursimatek_cv.pdf)
